nodes.name: Dusky spinetail
nodes.summary: Dusky spinetail（Dusky spinetail，学名 Synallaxis moesta），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联11个分布地点节点，主要威胁包括森林砍伐。

nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: brunneicaudalis is found from southeastern Nariño Department in far southwestern Colombia south through central Ecuador into northeastern Peru as far as northern San Martín Department. The dusky spinetail inhabits the edges of several forest types, including riparian and tropical evergreen forests; it also occurs in secondary forest
